title: Chapter 7
content:
Chapter 7: Go down!

Denzel turned around as soon as she pulled his shirt, with his skill still active he places his hands and on her cheek drilling intense pleasure into her.

’What he hell is this, I’ve felt horny before but...but nothing like this has happened before and all he has done is touch me, a simple touch and I’m this messed up’ Sophia was lost deep in thoughts confused about what was happening to her

In the same motion, Denzel stands up slightly and also pulls her along with him.

Their eyes stared at each other, Denzel dominant and Sophia shy still not knowing and confused on what was happening to her.

’Damn, she looks so gorgeous this close up. I’m definitely claiming and making her my personal slut tonight. But before that this is a perfect moment to go for the kiss...right...right’ Denzel thought

"...Sophia"

Denzel calls her name out with a soft breath and moves in to kiss her

She didn’t answer or rather he didn’t wait for her to give him an answer. Just leaned in and kissed her.

’Ahh, this is so awesome. With every contact he makes with my body I forget what is wrong and what is right. I shouldn’t be doing such acts with my brother but...but it’s so good I don’t want to stop him. When did Denzel become so dominant’ Sophia thought

Sophia froze only for a second before she grabbed his shirt and pulled him in like she has been starving for him.

The kiss turned filthy very quickly, their tongues sliding on each other, her lips wet and eager. Denzel gripped her hips and yanked her tight against him.

Sophia let out a moan into his mouth, grinding up against him without giving it much thought just lost in intense pleasure to the kiss, her body begging for more as his hand started to roam around her body.

When they finally pulled apart from each other, the both of them were now breathing harder than before.

Sophia looked up at him, cheeks flushed, lips swollen from the kiss.

"That was something."

Denzel looked deep into her eyes. "You didn’t hate it, right?"

She shook her head shyly and bent avoiding eye contact, breath unsteady. "...No, I didn’t"

"Good." He drew her closer to himself.

"Because I’ve been waiting many years for this."

"You really didn’t hate that, huh?" Denzel asked, his voice a low, rough rumble.

"No, I didn’t" Sophia managed to speak with the flush of red on her face, shaking her head quickly.

Denzel’s hair, still damp from her nervous earlier pacing, moved around her cheekbones.

She didn’t move away, her hands still balled tightly in the front of his shirt. "It was... a lot."

A cheeky dirty smile drew across Denzel’s face, the sheer, unapologetic hunger in her eyes mirroring his own.

He leaned in again, claiming her mouth in a slower, deeper kiss this time, one designed not for discovery, but more towards possession.

His hands, which had settled on the small of her back, slid down, finding her ass.

He pressed his palms flat against her firm butt, a pleasant surprise that made him tighten his grip. She was lean, but undeniably soft beneath the night gown.

’Holy shit, they’re so soft, and although that night gown loose on her it is pulled tight enough to show every curve in her body’ Denzel thought, applying slight pressure, tilting her pelvis up and grinding their lower bodies together even through the layers of clothing.

Sophia responded instantly, a low, breathy moan escaping deep in her throat, muffled against his mouth. Her hands released his shirt only to tangle them in his hair, pulling him closer, demanding more.

Denzel pulled back for air, eyes locked on her bouncing tits and perfect curves, hunger twisting through him.

He grabbed her and kissed her again, tongues clashing in a messy, filthy rush that made his whole body tighten.

’Her tongue is so warm, completely different from any other girl I’ve managed to kiss in my previous world. Sophia is slow, sweet, but with this incredible underlying desperation, like she’s starving. Well, that’s expected since she’s never had an intimate like this despite yearning it for years’ Denzel thought, completely mesmerized by the force and rhythm of her tongue.

They finally set some distance between each other, both of them panting, eyes searching each other’s faces. Denzel could see the exact point where control had slipped away from her grip.

The innocence she has been projecting all day and even from the memories he has of her was warring violently with a sudden, unleashed hunger.

A wide smile crossed Denzel’s face.

’Damn! As expected from a virgin. She’s not been taught anything so I can input my ideals into her and tame her to become my personal slut’ he thought, the predatory part of his brain kicking in.

He looked back at Sophia, who was catching her breath, her chest rising and falling quickly, the night dress clinging to her damp skin.

He reached out and gently brushed the blonde hair from her forehead, his touch soft, almost reverent.

"Sophia," he began, his voice dropping to a seductive whisper, the sound a stark contrast to the rough demands of a few seconds prior.

"I’ve wanted this for years. I want you. But I need to know you want it too. Say stop and I stop."

Denzel’s eyes moved down to his lips, then back up to his eyes. The desperation was still there, but now it was layered with a surprising and almost innocent desire to please him.

"No, it’s fine," Sophia replied...her voice soft but surprisingly firm. "Like I said before, I don’t hate it."

Denzel’s smile widened, but the gentleness remained on his face. He leaned forward and kissed her forehead.

"That’s my Sophia, good girl," he murmured and then drew back, his eyes catching hers, the look intense and commanding. "Now I want you to do something for me. I want to know if you can do it" he said while carresing her cheeks with his palms, his skill active and sending another burst of intense sensation down her body.

" I’ll do anything for you, Denzel" she said while clearly succumbing to his touch

Denzel continued

"Alright then, I want you to go down for me."
